items.name: Abyssal Wings: Emberroot Interstellar Wings
items.description:
Shaped from forgotten ash and forged in the breath of smoldering dusk, the Emberroot Interstellar wings carry the weight of ancient fire now long faded. These wings whisper of a time when embers ruled the wind, glowing softly beneath charred skies.

Price: 1000/5 stock
